ref: The king's officials told him about her, and she was taken to his house.
text: Ijip koori nabɔnzi n wa nau, ba chɔluu di ra tɛɛ a koori, di kpogluu zuu u kooridia.

ref: That's why people call the well between Kadesh and Bered, “The Well of the Living One Who Sees Me.”
text: Saŋa bɛl n wa helle, ba faa dau a bule hiŋ sɔŋ, Bɛɛ Lahai Rɔi, de haa du Kadɛs ni Bɛrɛd baambaannɛ.

ref: The clans that descended from Esau and Basemath's son Reuel were Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.
text: Ɛsau biibaal Riwɛl la ge biibaalaa faa, Nahaf, Zɛra, Samma ani Miza ba genii faa koora, Ɛdɔm hɛri. Ba ge faa ɛɛ Ɛsau haaŋ Basɛmaf naanna.

ref: Shem and Japheth put a robe over their shoulders and walked backwards into the tent. Without looking at their father, they placed it over his body.
text: Sɛm ni Jafɛf n wa nuu guŋ, ba kpa wɛjɛ yaau tɔ ba nyaŋa, di bir ba harbɔɔburumbuzi zuu a tanti dia, di kpau tɔ ba mɛɛ. Ba bir ba siweere ta bɔduma, ba gilɛɛ waa na ba mɛɛ chakpal wia.

ref: then he set up his tents and built an altar there to honor the God of Israel.
text: Denii u faa kuari mbusu lizibɔr de, di ra yir de Ɛl Ɛlɔhi Izrɛl.
